notes: User reviewed v14 render and gave sparse output-timestamp notes instead of full card review.
Mapped render timestamps to cut segments, then checked focused source sheets.
Most misses were pre-slide detector starts with default 0.65s tails ending before the actual slide; store explicit reveal windows so the render cannot snap over them.

frameReference.note: Focused v15 issue sheet starts 0.6s before the current candidate, so the current candidate/cut point is frame 7.

reviews.note: 28s render note: Pofele Ashlock into Jovantae Barnes was snapping because the previous window ended before the real slide. Start on the visible upward motion and carry through the settled Jovantae card.
33s render note: Dawson Pendergrass into Gunner Stockton Playbook missed the reveal. Current start was pre-slide; use the actual upward motion and a full reveal tail.
1:07 render note: Troy Stellato into KC Concepcion did not show enough slide reveal. Nudge to the active slide and extend the tail.
1:44 render note: Mikey Keene felt skipped. Give the first card of pack 14 a longer clean hold before the Peyton Lewis reveal.
1:44 render note: Peyton Lewis reveal point was almost two seconds late on the wide source sheet, causing Mikey Keene to get eaten. Move Peyton's reveal to the true slide window.
1:53 render note: Gunner Stockton Dean's List hit did not land or hold long enough. Start on the actual reveal, play through the hit landing, then hold the settled hit longer.
2:02 render note: Aidan Mizell into Diego Pavia blinked because the old reveal window ended before the slide began. Move to the actual slide and carry it through.
2:25 render note: Jayden Virgin-Morgan into Eric Singleton Jr. had a visible reveal but a rough tail/hold boundary. Keep the accepted start and extend through the settled card.
2:38 render note: Harrison Wallace III into Ethan Vasko had no slide because the old segment ended before the slide started. Move to the actual upward motion and extend the reveal.
